# reconcile-web


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install reconcile_web in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure reconcile_web package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to reconcile_web
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

This is a private repository (real financial data lives in the companion
`reconcile-archive` repo) — it is not published to pypi or conda.
Install from a clone:

``` sh
$ git clone https://github.com/doyu/reconcile-web.git
$ cd reconcile-web && pip install -e .
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/doyu/reconcile-web)’s
[pages](https://doyu.github.io/reconcile-web/).

## How to use

A read-only viewer over a `reconcile-archive` checkout. Configuration is
env-only:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>env</th>
<th>meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>ARCHIVE_DIR</code></td>
<td>path to the reconcile-archive checkout</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>APP_PASSWORD</code></td>
<td>the single shared login password</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SESSION_SECRET</code></td>
<td>session-cookie signing key (generate once per deployment)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Run:

``` sh
ARCHIVE_DIR=~/reconcile-archive APP_PASSWORD=... SESSION_SECRET=... \
  uvicorn --factory reconcile_web.app:create_app
```

or `python -c "from reconcile_web.app import serve; serve()"`. HTTPS
termination is the reverse proxy’s job; the app must never be exposed
directly.
